3.2  Long Short-TermMemory Networks
Long Short-Term Memory networks are a type of recurr
dependencies. LSTMs are particularly suited for sequence
tasks, where the goal is to divide a sequence into meaningf
An LSTM unit consists of a cell, an input gate, a forget gate
to selectively remember or forget information.
LSTM Equations
The LSTM network is governed by the following equations
ft = σ(Wfxt +Ufht−1 + bf )
it = σ(Wixt +Uiht−1 + bi)

Here:
• xt: Input vector at time t.
• ht: Hidden state at time t.
• ct: Cell state at time t.
